//: ProveKit backend service on Railway. Set the service's Root Directory to `backend` so the Docker build context matches backend/Dockerfile (it does COPY requirements.txt .). The frontend is a second service from the same repo — see deploy/ONE_CLICK.md for its config and the variables both services need.

deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'DATABASE_URL=$(printf %s "$DATABASE_URL" | sed -E "s@^postgres(ql)?://@postgresql+psycopg://@"); export DATABASE_URL; exec uvicorn provekit.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000} --proxy-headers --forwarded-allow-ips=*'
